## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, API keys, tokens, model weights, or generated caches.
- [ ] I updated README or docs when behavior changed.
- [ ] I kept `requirements.txt` broad and compatible with existing ComfyUI environments.
- [ ] I ran `uv run ruff check .`.
- [ ] I ran `uv run ruff format --check .`.
- [ ] I tested the affected nodes in ComfyUI when relevant.

## Screenshots Or Logs

Add screenshots, workflow captures, or sanitized logs if helpful.
